Swagbound Sprite Audit

Separate visual review pages for sprite triage, duplicate cleanup, and source/canon decisions.

People / Walk11 character sets for heroes, NPC-ish sprites, and walking/source anchors.Enemies409 battle/overworld generated sets.Props / Objects156 story objects, map props, environment sprites, and odd leftovers.Duplicates1079 exact duplicate or same-set variant groups for pruning. Canonical Character Sets420 identity-level sets for one battle + one overworld, or friendly OW/walk-only review. Battle Backgrounds15 background sets for act and boss-context review.
